## Scope checklist

- [ ] Stays within WireGuard-only public ingress model
- [ ] Does not add password-based SSH as a default
- [ ] Does not expose admin UIs publicly by default
- [ ] Does not require committing secrets or generated outputs
- [ ] Documentation (README, docs/, example configs) can be updated to match
